title: oxymeris tetraquetra
intro: Oxymeris tetraquetra, also known as the four-angled oxymeris, is a type of tropical plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxymeris tetraquetra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
